name: Medibank Private Limited
analysis: MPL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.8950, stop A$4.5837, target A$5.8289 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
